intro: A festive raffle stand stands at the edge of the square, its drum of tickets spinning lazily. A hand-painted board lists the prizes, with one rare relic crowning the top.
speaker: Raffle Host
introDialogue: Care to try your luck? One ticket, one draw, and everyone walks away with something!$The grand prize is a genuine Formation Relic, but even the smallest ticket pays out. What do you say?
title: Town Raffle
description: A town raffle. Pay a small entry fee and draw a single ticket. Every ticket pays out something, from a couple of Poke Balls up to a Great or Ultra tier item, and a lucky few draw the grand prize: a rare Formation Relic. Or you can decline and keep your money.

1.label: Buy a ticket (pay the fee)
1.tooltip:
(-) A small fee
(+) Always wins something, with a small chance at a Formation Relic
1.selected: You hand over the fee and draw a ticket from the spinning drum...

2.label: Decline
2.selected: You wave the host off and move along.

jackpot: A bell rings out and the host throws up their hands! You have drawn the grand prize, a genuine Formation Relic!
midPrize: The host checks your ticket and nods, impressed. A fine prize is yours to pick!
consolation: Not the big one, but the host smiles and hands you a small consolation prize. Everyone wins something here!
